name: mootup-moot-cli-js
description: Host-side JS packages for mootup (moot-cli, moot-sdk, moot-templates).

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mootup/moot-sdk && npm run build -w @mootup/moot-templates && npm run build -w @mootup/moot-cli
scripts.test: npm run test -w @mootup/moot-sdk && npm run test -w @mootup/moot-templates && npm run test -w @mootup/moot-cli
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @mootup/moot-sdk && npm run lint -w @mootup/moot-templates && npm run lint -w @mootup/moot-cli
